title: Shooting coyotes; Swede John's timber ranch
description: Shooting coyotes at his old stand. Swede John's timber ranch.

title: Using dogs to hunt bobcat and coyotes
description: Buster tracks a bobcat; skill of his hunting dogs. Practicing on a tomcat. Dogs drive coyote down the hill to his waiting gun.

title: Shooting matches with Clausen for chicken or geese prizes
description: Shooting matches with Clausen for chicken or geese prizes

title: Hunting down a coyote with 21 hounds
description: A hunting party with 21 hounds tracks a coyote, but Archie shoots him as he jumps a fence.

title: How he picks his hunting stand and it's current location
description: How he picked his stand, by the present site of the Mountain Home Grange.

title: Hunting coyotes and prices on bounty versus hides
description: Coyote runways and habits. His tame coyote bites another man. He captures pups by pulling them out of the den with a wire; got $3 for bounty, $1 for hide.

title: Having a pet coyote and having to kill it
description: (continued) Taking his pet coyote plowing. Killing his pet. Coyotes have too much hell to be trained like dogs.

title: Reasons for him hunting; taking his wife hunting
description: He hunted for sport, for something to do in winter. Taking his wife hunting.

title: Playing at dances at Deep Creek schoolhouse.
description: Playing at dances at Deep Creek schoolhouse.

title: A man is bowled over by his hunting hound. Hunting with other farmers.
description: A man is bowled over by his hunting hound. Hunting with other farmers.

title: Training his saddle horse to stand still and come to him.
description: Training his saddle horse to stand still and come to him.

title: Shipping household items across the country; training horses
description: Shipping the household goods and stock by train from Minnesota to Palouse. A trained colt.
